findings.evidence: `matrixBilinearForm_apply` is `@[simp]` at lines 93-97, while `matrixBilinearForm_self` at lines 105-108 has no annotation; `UniformlyEllipticOn.lower_bound` exposes the lower bound in `A.toQuadraticForm'` form at lines 173-178.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `matrixBilinearForm_self` so `simp` rewrites the quadratic part of `matrixBilinearForm` to `A.toQuadraticForm' ξ`.
findings.issue: `matrixBilinearForm_self` is the characteristic normal-form bridge from `matrixBilinearForm A ξ ξ` to `A.toQuadraticForm' ξ`, but it is not marked `@[simp]`. This leaves downstream coercivity/lower-bound goals in the Lax--Milgram shape `B u u` unable to simplify to the existing quadratic-form API automatically.

summary: The exposed surface is mostly scoped to the PDE target, but the quadratic characteristic lemma is missing the automation annotation needed to use the new form without manual rewriting.
